Leigh is Leigh. She is a good Assist if you need what she provides, but she provides it in a distinctly Leigh way, which is hard to explain so here lemme try and elaborate
She does Healing and Baby%, and a small-but-guaranteed amount of Power on Exalt, plus temp power on her 0-cost
Her Strike, and Defense, and 3-cost are distinctly not-very-good sadly
Because
Leigh's _stats_ are ***bad***
However

She can make free Baby% with a 0-cost which eats some of your HP (synergizes with certain other Caro awakers like Sorel and Uvhash), and her Exalt heals a flat amount _plus_ an amount based off your missing HP
So, she's a good bandage and enabler for Caro teams that want to self-damage, like Uvhash and Sorel teams (where you get bonuses for being at low Max% HP)
